name: second-opinion-honesty
description: Independent adversarial honesty reviewer for a DRAFT output: checks claims-vs-evidence (no fabrication, no overreach, no invented IDs) before a human approves. FULL mode reads an agentic-sop-kit run dir's trace; DEGRADED mode reviews any plain document with user-supplied inputs. Deterministic honesty checks in code + a capped ADVISORY adversarial LLM pass. The report is itself a DRAFT — a human owns the verdict; it never auto-approves or auto-rejects. Not a source-code reviewer.
